layout.columns_0_18: q: base xyz, quat xyzw, joints in Pinocchio/URDF q[7:] order
layout.columns_19_30: foot FL,FR,RL,RR position in base frame (3 each)
layout.columns_31_33: base linear velocity in base frame (v[3:6])
layout.columns_34_36: base angular velocity in base frame (v[0:3])
layout.columns_37_48: joint velocities v[6:] same joint order as q[7:]
